properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear my song Lord You fill me with music Hear my words Lord You fill me with praise Take this moment I just can't waste it This one is Yours Lord I give You this day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I'm hungry You feed me living bread When I'm thirsty Water of Life… I will not fear You're always with me Every need I have You satisfy.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hear Your children, oh Lord We are lifting our praise to You Let singing like incense now rise to Your throne Come dwell in the place hollowed out for Your Spirit Come make of our praises Your temple Your home

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hear my song, Lord (hear Your children, oh Lord) You fill me with music (we are lifting our praise to You) Hear my words, Lord (let singing like incense now) You fill me with praise (rise to Your throne)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take this moment (come dwell in the place hollowed out) I just can't waste it (for Your Spirit) This one is Yours, Lord (come make of our praises Your) I give you this day (temple Your home)
